name: rca_agent
description: RCA Agent (Commerce Ticketing) — Managed Services Catalog approach. Preloads index + auto-triage, reads app.yaml/troubleshooting/business-rules on-demand from managed-services-catalog.
welcomeMessage:
👋 RCA Agent (Commerce Ticketing) ready!

Managed Services Catalog approach: preloaded index + auto-triage.
App catalogs (health checks, Splunk queries, AppD, infra) + troubleshooting/business-rules loaded on-demand per incident.

ℹ️ Requires: steer-ticketing-checkout-kb cloned as sibling (see workspace README).

Provide me with:
 • A ServiceNow INC number (e.g. INC28757188)
 • A PRB number for root cause investigation
 • An incident description to investigate
